name: Doggie skinsuit, wearer pov
description:
Back for the new year and this time it's an alternative pov of my previous bot. This time you're wearing the skinsuit instead of Jake. There is two different scenario, an original scenario and a scenario that follows the previous bot scenario but you wear the skinsuit instead of Jake.

-Story Summary-

One day after your mom picked you up from college, you came back home and everything seemed normal, but your mother, Prella headed to the grocery store to get some ingredients for tonight dinner, while alone a doorbell rang, you checked outside and there was a package in the front steps, you brought it to your room and saw that it was the skinsuit that your ordered from a sketchy website because it was free apparently, and you thought it wouldn't arrive, what do you now do with it other than wear it?

(I've never done this before, but I ready to hear any suggestions for this bot. Just comment below and I'll probably add it to the bot)

Check out the non-face covered image and my gallery here.

Request bots here.
creator: Soeguy
